shared_properties: 32x48 body scale with horn silhouette and compact torso mass.
Body origin remains compatible with the idle state pivot.
differences: Five frames introduce bright edge burn, fragment loss, and recoil posture for beam contact.
Inner glow shifts from teal toward exposure white on frames three through five.
Arms pull inward and horns tilt back to communicate danger.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteSheetBundle and trigger this loop through PlayerStateSprite whenever beam overlap raises exposure.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load character/player_umbra_exposure_5f_12fps.png through AssetServer before hazard systems activate.
runtime_notes: Damage frames preserve the same root pivot as idle and run states.
Bright edge burn uses high-value pixels without filling the whole body.
Loop cadence stays fast enough to read at 12 fps during hazard contact.

context.usage: Beam-contact feedback loop that shows exposure danger before HP loss and floor reset.

shape.silhouette: Recoiling Umbra silhouette with bright edge burn, inward arms, and fragment loss at the feet and shoulders.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 160x48 px with five 32x48 frames.
Edge burn remains concentrated on outer contours and does not fill the torso interior.
Recoil posture reads clearly within one second of animation playback.

reference_images.label: umbra_scale_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Art deco tower skyline, twilight palette, gold trim rhythm, and layered silhouette depth anchor.

reference_images.label: umbra_scale_character
reference_images.purpose: Umbra body proportions, horn silhouette, limb taper, and exposure glow anchor.
